get.description: Returns 200 as long as the process is running.
Returns 200 once app state is fully constructed, 503 otherwise.

200.description: Service is ready to serve traffic

get.description: Returns app metadata resolved against the live ActionSpec registry.

Execute an action on the lab_admin service. Use `action: "help"` to list available actions.

get.description: Browser-friendly data route for the Server Logs operator app. Mirrors `server_logs.query`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return.

parameters.name: max_scan_bytes
parameters.description: Maximum number of log bytes to scan.

post.description: Execute an action on the server_logs service. Use `action: "help"` to list available actions.
Execute an action on the setup service. Use `action: "help"` to list available actions.
Execute an action on the snippets service. Use `action: "help"` to list available actions.

ActionRequest.description:
Shared request type for all service action dispatchers.

Every service handler deserializes `POST /v1/<service>` bodies into this
struct and forwards `action` + `params` to the corresponding dispatch
function, keeping HTTP and MCP input semantics aligned while each transport
owns its response envelope.

ErrorSdk.description: Error envelope for SDK pass-through errors (`auth_failed`, `rate_limited`, etc.).

kind.description: Stable kind tag from the SDK (e.g. `"auth_failed"`, `"rate_limited"`).

valid.description: Valid action names for this service.

pending.description:
Human-readable list of predicates not yet satisfied.
Present only on 503 responses.

status.description:
Status string: `"ok"` for liveness, `"ready"` or `"not_ready"` for
readiness.

uptime_s.description: Seconds since the server started accepting requests.
